sections.heading: Looking for beta testers
body: We're looking for theatres that want to be in early. Together we'll shape the interface so it fits the everyday work of your house – not the other way around.
In return you get a direct line to the development team, your system informs the design, and you'll be the first to be connected to platforms, archives and media.

sections.heading: What's in it for you
body: No more tedious copy & paste into third-party systems.
Automatic data transfer to archives, platforms, display systems and press services.
Full control: you decide who may use which data.
